Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer.

passages.title: The History of Tea
passages.content:
Tea is one of the most widely consumed beverages in the world, second only to water. Its origins can be traced back to ancient China, where according to legend it was discovered by the Emperor Shen Nong in 2737 BC.

Over the centuries, tea spread along trade routes to Japan, the Middle East and eventually Europe. By the seventeenth century it had become a fashionable drink among the wealthy classes of Britain.

Today, tea is cultivated in more than forty countries, with India and China remaining the largest producers. The global tea industry supports millions of workers and continues to grow steadily each year.

questionGroups.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the passage? Write TRUE, FALSE or NOT GIVEN.

questions.question: Tea is the most consumed drink in the world.
Tea was first discovered in China.
Tea is grown in over forty countries today.

tasks.title: Writing Task 1
tasks.content:
The chart below shows the percentage of households in different income brackets that owned a computer between 2000 and 2020.

Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.

Write at least 150 words.

tasks.title: Writing Task 2
tasks.content:
Some people believe that unpaid community service should be a compulsory part of high school programmes.

To what extent do you agree or disagree?

Give reasons for your answer and include any relevant examples from your own knowledge or experience.

Write at least 250 words.
